# ShopJinn — AI-Powered Shopping Guides for India

> ShopJinn is India's AI-powered tech product buying guide platform. We publish daily buying guides covering smartphones, laptops, earbuds, smart TVs, air conditioners, smartwatches, and home appliances — with honest comparisons across Amazon India and Flipkart.

## About
- Publisher: ShopJinn (shopjinnog@gmail.com)
- Target Market: Indian consumers
- Update Frequency: 3 new buying guides daily
- Language: English (India)

## Properties
- Main Site: https://shopjinn.com
- Blog & Guides: https://blog.shopjinn.com
- Coupons & Deals: https://blog.shopjinn.com/coupons/
- Affiliate Disclosure: https://blog.shopjinn.com/affiliate-disclosure

## Full Content Index
- llms.txt (blog): https://blog.shopjinn.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap (blog): https://blog.shopjinn.com/sitemap.xml
- Sitemap (main): https://shopjinn.com/sitemap.xml

## Categories
- Smartphones: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/smartphones/
- Laptops: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/laptops/
- Earbuds: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/earbuds/
- Smart TVs: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/smart-tvs/
- Air Conditioners: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/ac/
- Smartwatches: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/smartwatches/
- Tech News: https://blog.shopjinn.com/category/news/
- Coupons: https://blog.shopjinn.com/coupons/
